description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with ornate, gold-accented blades and a richly detailed central motif. The blades are symmetrical, each featuring intricate gold filigree and a dark, metallic edge, giving the weapon a regal and intimidating appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and wrapped in a textured, reddish-brown material, likely leather, providing a secure grip. Both ends of the handle are capped with decorative metalwork, and the central section where the blades meet the handle is reinforced with additional metallic elements. The axe exudes a sense of craftsmanship, with elaborate engravings and a robust, heavy-duty construction. Its overall design suggests it is both a functional tool and a ceremonial or display piece.
description: A double-headed, gold-accented battle axe with ornate blades and a textured, reddish-brown handle capped with decorative metalwork. The design is both functional and highly decorative.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the side, showing the narrow profile of the blades and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the symmetrical double blades with gold filigree, central motif, and detailed handle wrapping.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the slim profile and end caps of the handle.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the double blades, central reinforcement, and ornate handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle wrapped in textured reddish-brown leather, likely wood core, with decorative metal end caps and a grippy surface.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical blades with wide, curved edges, ornate gold filigree, and a reinforced central motif; no beard, with decorative and functional features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and reinforced with decorative metal bands at the blade-handle junction.
